Details List.SourceString: Play glowing notes to gain Overdrive.
Details List.LocalizedString: Play glowing notes to gain Overdrive.

Details List.SourceString: Spend Overdrive to launch Attacks against the opponent in front of you.
Details List.LocalizedString: Spend Overdrive to launch Attacks against the opponent in front of you.

Details List.SourceString: Attacks disrupt the note track when they impact. Avoid breaking your streak!
Details List.LocalizedString: Attacks disrupt the note track when they impact. Avoid breaking your streak!

Details List.SourceString: Attacks double your score multiplier and halve your target’s for the duration.
Details List.LocalizedString: Attacks double your score multiplier and halve your target’s for the duration.
